form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track on March 2 over 1106m, 11 len behind Looking For You with 55kg at $2.80. Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at this track on March 21 over 1207m, 11 len behind Every Third Day with 55kg at $14. In with a chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12.5). Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track on March 2 over 1106m, 11 len behind Looking For You with 55kg at $2.80. Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at this track on March 21 over 1207m, 11 len behind Every Third Day with 55kg at $14. In with a chance.

form.formComment: Comes off a 30 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on March 9 over 1207m, 4 len behind Twelfth Night with 57kg at $4.30. The race before that sat on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 10 at Santa Anita Turf on February 22 over 1308m, 10 len behind Gordon's Legacy carrying 56kg at $79.80. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9). Comes off a 30 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on March 9 over 1207m, 4 len behind Twelfth Night with 57kg at $4.30. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Comes off a 48 day let-up. First-up 2nd of 10 at this track on January 19 over 1207m, 2.25 len behind Hela Forever carrying 56kg at $2.20. Second run from a spell rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at this track on February 19 over 1006m, 0.3 len behind Hold Your Temper carrying 56kg at $2.10. Racing well. Has strong claims.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since he finished last in a small field at Santa Anita June 1 over 1207m, 32 len behind Thirty Two Chunk carrying 54.5kg at $25.80. On debut ran last of 9 at Santa Anita Turf April 27 over 1207m, 15 len behind Helicity carrying 53.5kg at $68. Winning hope in a suitable contest.
